caption: A person's hands are shown handling holographic sports trading cards over a black surface with red accents. In the beginning, a card is held up, revealing a reflective design, while a black box labeled "OBSIDIAN" and a "JASPYS" logo with the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are visible. Small inset windows in the video show a man with a beard wearing a black shirt sitting in a room with shelves in the background. As the sequence progresses, the person shifts the cards, moving them toward a clear plastic protective sleeve. The "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" logos remain prominently on screen throughout the action. The movement focuses on the tactile process of sorting and protecting the collectible cards, with the background remaining consistent while the hands rotate and slide the cards into place.
